heading: Appointment and compensation of Administrative Assistant, Legislative Assistant, and Executive Secretary for Deputy President pro tempore of Senate
label: 6114 Appointment and compensation of Administrative Assistant, Legislative Assistant, and Executive Secretary for Deputy President pro tempore of Senate
text: Effective , the Deputy President pro tempore is authorized to appoint and fix the compensation of an Administrative Assistant at not to exceed $47,595 per annum; a Legislative Assistant at not to exceed $40,080 per annum, and an Executive Secretary at not to exceed $23,380 per annum.April 1, 1977
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 61 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.lSection is from the Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1977.

Increases in CompensationIncreases in compensation for officers and employees of the Senate under authority of the Federal Pay Comparability Act of 1970 (), see Salary Directives of the President pro tempore of the Senate, set out as notes under .Pub. L. 91–656section 4571 of this title
